strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: Radd is under complete control of the player.
strings.panel.p2.narration.1.html: For example, if the player wants Radd to fight deadly enemies, he has to obey.
strings.panel.p3.narration.1.html: Or, if the player decides to run Radd into a bottomless pit...
strings.panel.p3.bubble.center.html: I watched a lot of Roadrunner cartoons as a kid.
